title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Impresario Entertainment - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Impresario Entertainment - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Impresario Entertainment are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Impresario Entertainment:
Impresario Entertainment is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Impresario Entertainment!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
